posts.author: Tarek (Tarek Elkhodry)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, Now i have more boards and they are connect boards with the main board, this main board contain with all data, and distribute specific data to others departments boards, every department board is assigned to specific manager, the issue with me is how to hide the main board from team members, as i in Pro plan.
